name: Affordable Housing Trust for Columbus and Franklin County
description_short: Affordable Housing Trust for Columbus and Franklin County is a free credit assistance provider based in Columbus, Ohio. Rated 5.0/5 on Google.
description_long:
Affordable Housing Trust for Columbus and Franklin County is a free credit assistance provider serving clients in Columbus, Ohio. The company serves consumers in the Columbus area who are looking to access free credit counseling and financial guidance.

Affordable Housing Trust for Columbus and Franklin County specializes in free credit assistance services designed to help consumers access free credit counseling and financial guidance. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Non-profit and free credit assistance providers in Columbus offer valuable resources for consumers who need help but may not be able to afford paid services. Affordable Housing Trust for Columbus and Franklin County provides an important community service, and consumers should verify the organization's non-profit status and HUD-approval where applicable. Free counseling sessions can be a good starting point before committing to paid credit repair or debt relief programs.

Consumers in the Columbus, Ohio area who are considering Affordable Housing Trust for Columbus and Franklin County should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any free credit assistance provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
